achievements.description: Kill General Shibayama Hyobei at Kuruwa River III.

achievements.description: Conquer Kuruwa River III without killing General Shibayama Hyobei.

achievements.title: I Tire of Spiders
achievements.description: Conquer Spider Temple.

achievements.description: Kill Spider Monk Saisai at Spider Temple.

achievements.description: Conquer Spider Temple without killing Spider Monk Saisai.

achievements.description: Conquer Karasuma Road.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Conscripted Into the Past
achievements.description: Capture some Nintendo Employees in the secret Kyoto stage.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: The Way of Nintendo
achievements.description: Conquer Karasuma Keep. Congratulations, you beat the game! This unlocks "Free Play".
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Genshin Gutted
achievements.description: Kill Genshin at Karasuma Keep.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Genshin Spared
achievements.description: Conquer Karasuma Keep without killing Genshin.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Just the Basics
achievements.description: Collect the Command Scroll on Kuruwa Plains I that unlocks the "advance", "march left", "march right", and "fall back" commands.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Your Bread and Butter
achievements.description: Collect the Command Scroll on Kuruwa Plains I that unlocks the "press forward" command.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Swarm Tactics
achievements.description: Collect the Command Scroll on Kuruwa Plains I that unlocks the "flank and destroy" command.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: I Rally Hope You're Ready For This Command!
achievements.description: Collect the Command Scroll on Kuruwa Plains II that unlocks the "rally" command.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Halt it Right There
achievements.description: Collect the Command Scroll on Kuruwa Plains II that unlocks the "company, halt" command.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Wouldn't It Be Funny If You Never Used These Commands Again?
achievements.description: Collect the Command Scroll on Kuruwa Plains III that unlocks the "flood the river" and "close the gate" commands.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Charged With A Great Duty
achievements.description: Collect the Command Scroll on Kuruwa Plains III that unlocks the "charge" command.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Thanks, Odama!
achievements.description: Earn an extra Odama any way you can while in a level. (Free Play excluded)
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Lucky Cat Odama
achievements.description: Have a total of 9 Odamas at the same time.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Hold Your Horses!
achievements.description: Recruit 10 cavalry into your army.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Jelly Donuts for Days
achievements.description: Save up 10 rice balls.
achievements.author: AfroRyan
